The passband should span 1.3 kHz to 3.5 kHz with less than 2.5 dB insertion loss. At 3.39 Hz and 70.6 kHz the circuit should provide at least 23.6 dB of rejection. The frequency response must remain stable regardless of what drives the input.

REQUIREMENTS:
  Type: band-pass filter
  Lower passband edge (fc_low): 1.303 kHz  [max loss: 2.5 dB]
  Upper passband edge (fc_high): 3.497 kHz  [max loss: 2.5 dB]
  Lower stopband edge (fs_low): 3.39 Hz  [min attenuation: 23.6 dB]
  Upper stopband edge (fs_high): 70.62 kHz  [min attenuation: 23.6 dB]
netlist:
* Single-stage passive RC band-pass filter with input op-amp buffer
V1   VIN   0     AC 1

* Input buffer (ideal unity-gain voltage follower)
EBUF VBUF  0     VIN 0  1

* High-pass section (sets lower cutoff)
CH1  VBUF   NH1    7.3n
RH1  NH1    0      32.0k

* Mid buffer to isolate HP from LP
EMID NMID  0     NH1 0  1

* Low-pass section (sets upper cutoff)
RL1  NMID   VOUT   1.8k
CL1  VOUT   0      21.2n

  Upper stopband edge (fs_high): 320.1 kHz  [min attenuation: 19.2 dB]

The passband spans 426 Hz to 1.53 kHz and must have <= 3.5 dB insertion loss. A minimum of 23.0 dB rejection is required at 20.9 Hz and 32 kHz. Ensure the cutoffs are set by R and C alone; minimise part count.

REQUIREMENTS:
  Type: band-pass filter
  Lower passband edge (fc_low): 426.2 Hz  [max loss: 3.5 dB]
  Upper passband edge (fc_high): 1.527 kHz  [max loss: 3.5 dB]
  Lower stopband edge (fs_low): 20.88 Hz  [min attenuation: 23.0 dB]
  Upper stopband edge (fs_high): 31.96 kHz  [min attenuation: 23.0 dB]
netlist:
* Single-stage passive RC band-pass filter with input op-amp buffer
V1   VIN   0     AC 1

* Input buffer (ideal unity-gain voltage follower)
EBUF VBUF  0     VIN 0  1

* High-pass section (sets lower cutoff)
CH1  VBUF   NH1    42.2n
RH1  NH1    0      11.4k

* Mid buffer to isolate HP from LP
EMID NMID  0     NH1 0  1

* Low-pass section (sets upper cutoff)
RL1  NMID   VOUT   4.54k
CL1  VOUT   0      27.2n

The passband must span 38.7 kHz to 70.5 kHz with no more than 11.9 dB of insertion loss. Frequencies at 122 Hz and 19.7 MHz must be attenuated by at least 87.0 dB. The source must be isolated from the RC ladder so the cutoffs are determined by component values alone; minimise total component count.

  Type: band-pass filter
  Lower passband edge (fc_low): 38.68 kHz  [max loss: 11.9 dB]
  Upper passband edge (fc_high): 70.51 kHz  [max loss: 11.9 dB]
  Lower stopband edge (fs_low): 122.1 Hz  [min attenuation: 87.0 dB]
  Upper stopband edge (fs_high): 19.7 MHz  [min attenuation: 87.0 dB]

RH1  NH1    0      6.18k

RL2  NL1    VOUT   1.29k
